table.name: activity_treatment_unit
table.remarks: An Activity Treatment Unit is a Silvicultural treatment that is performed on a mappable area which deliniates a specific area of land. ATUs may not span opening boundaries but an opening may have more than one ATU associated with it.

column.name: activity_treatment_unit_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the Activity Treatment Unit.

column.name: activity_tu_seq_no
column.remarks: Internal processing variable used to maintain order of the activity treatment units for a specific opening.

column.name: org_unit_no
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests" offices. Values stored here are for the computer"s use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: silviculture_project_id
column.remarks: A system generated key which uniquely identifies an occurrence of a Silviculture Project.

column.name: project_unit_id
column.remarks: A system generated sequence to uniquely identify each of the units within the project. First activity assigned to the project is unit 1; second is unit 2; and, so on.

column.name: silv_base_code
column.remarks: Identifies a primary category of Silviculture Activity.

column.name: silv_technique_code
column.remarks: Describes the broad category of technique, used for the base activity (eg.BU = BURN).

column.name: silv_method_code
column.remarks: Describes the specific machinery or method used for the base activity (eg. SHEAR = hand shears). A code for the method category of silvicultural activity planned.

column.name: silv_objective_code_1
column.remarks: A code which defines the silviculture objective for performing the specific (base/technique/method) silvicultural activity.

column.name: silv_objective_code_2
column.remarks: A code which defines the silviculture objective for performing the specific (base/technique/method) silvicultural activity.

column.name: silv_objective_code_3
column.remarks: A code which defines the silviculture objective for performing the specific (base/technique/method) silvicultural activity.

column.name: silv_fund_srce_code
column.remarks: A code indicating which Funding Program will be the primary funding source for silviculture activities on the opening.

column.name: silv_activity_measurement_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the measurement for the Activity

column.name: activity_licensee_id
column.remarks: A unique identifier provided by the Licensee to identify the Activity Number.

column.name: treatment_amount
column.remarks: The amount (unit of measure) of work actually completed for the ATU.

column.name: actual_treatment_cost
column.remarks: The actual cost incurred to complete the work.

column.name: act_planted_no
column.remarks: The actual number seedlings planted for each activity treatment unit. If a planned activity exists, the planned number is defaulted as the actual planted number.

column.name: plan_silv_technique_code
column.remarks: Describes the broad category of technique, used for the base activity (eg.BU = BURN).

column.name: plan_silv_method_code
column.remarks: Describes the specific machinery or method used for the base activity (eg. SHEAR = hand shears). A code for the method category of silvicultural activity planned.

column.name: plan_silv_fund_srce_code
column.remarks: A code indicating which Funding Program will be the primary funding source for silviculture activities on the opening.

column.name: planned_date
column.remarks: The century, year and month in which work on the ATU is planned to commence. The Day component of the date will be set to "01".

column.name: planned_treatment_amount
column.remarks: The planned amount (unit of measure) of work for the ATU.

column.name: planned_treatment_cost
column.remarks: The total cost anticipated to complete the work.

column.name: plan_silv_objective_code_1
column.remarks: A code which defines the silviculture objective for performing the specific (base/technique/method) silvicultural activity.

column.name: plan_silv_objective_code_2
column.remarks: A code which defines the silviculture objective for performing the specific (base/technique/method) silvicultural activity.

column.name: plan_silv_objective_code_3
column.remarks: A code which defines the silviculture objective for performing the specific (base/technique/method) silvicultural activity.

column.name: min_acceptable_density
column.remarks: The contracted minimum allowable stand density of total countable conifers.

column.name: silv_tree_species_code
column.remarks: The secondary tree species of Crown timber that was cut, damaged, destroyed or removed without authority

column.name: atu_start_date
column.remarks: The actual start date of the activity. Currently only pertains to Disturbance activities (SILV BASE CODE = "DN")

column.name: atu_completion_date
column.remarks: The actual date when the activity is completed.

column.name: results_ind
column.remarks: A system controlled Yes/No flag indicating if activity results have been recorded for the ATU.

column.name: unit_bid_price
column.remarks: Contract bid price per unit of work.

column.name: fia_project_id
column.remarks: The Project Id identified for the Forest Investment Account.

column.name: results_submission_id
column.remarks: Used to link information about a data submission. A submission may have many rows of Silviculture (Form A), Activities (Form B), and Forest Cover/Milestones (Form C) information. This attribute will be receiving a system generated number from the Electronic Submission Framework.

column.name: disturbance_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the reason for the disturbance within the opening.

column.name: silv_system_code
column.remarks: The code signifying the silviculture system that the post logging treatment code is to be applied to. (Ex. "B" for Basic silviculture).

column.name: silv_system_variant_code
column.remarks: The code for the silvicultural system variant, which further describes the functional attributes of the particular silvicultural system

column.name: silv_cut_phase_code
column.remarks: The code for the actual silvicultural system cut phase. The cut phase of a silvicultural system variant describes the function of a harvest to extract merchantable timber and achieve a silviculture treatment.

column.name: cut_block_open_admin_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the Cut Block/Opening.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who last updated the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: Internal counter used by the system to avoid conflicting updates to the record.

column.name: silviculture_comment_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the ISIS comment.

column.name: activity_treatment_unit_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the Activity Treatment Unit.

column.name: age_class_code
column.remarks: The age classification of the primary tree species in the previous stand (for the area under the prescription).

column.name: description
column.remarks: Full description of code value.

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: The date the value is available for use.

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: The date the value is no longer available for use.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the value was last modified.

column.name: block_status_code
column.remarks: The before status image of the Cut Block. The status indicates the point the Cut Block is at in it"s lifecycle. Examples are: PP - Planning, HA - Harvesting, LC - Logging Complete, and S - Silviculture.

column.name: description
column.remarks: Description of the code value

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: Date the code becomes effective

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: Date the code expires

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the value was last modified.

column.name: cascade_split_code
column.remarks: Code to indicate the administrative split for the timber mark, east or west of the Cascade Mountains, for tracking timber volume information.

column.name: description
column.remarks: Description of the code value

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: Date the code becomes effective

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: Date the code expires

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the value was last modified.

table.name: client_location
table.remarks: The description and the details of the address(es) at which a client operates. Its main purpose is to provide alternate mailing addresses. Maximum number of locations per client is 99. The average is 2 per client. Location 00 is always the client.

column.name: client_number
column.remarks: Sequentially assigned number to identify a ministry client.

column.name: client_locn_code
column.remarks: A code to uniquely identify, within each client, the addresses of different divisions or locations at which the client operates. The location code is sequentially assigned starting with "00" for the client"s permanent address.

column.name: client_locn_name
column.remarks: Restricted for identifying corporate division names and joint venture names. Other comments are INVALID.

column.name: hdbs_company_code
column.remarks: The identifier used as the key to the name and address table in the Harvest Database System. It is maintained in this system as a cross-reference to the name and address file.

column.name: address_1
column.remarks: The first line of the client"s address.

column.name: address_2
column.remarks: The second line of the client"s address.

column.name: address_3
column.remarks: The third line of the client"s address.

column.name: city
column.remarks: Town or City name of the client"s address.

column.name: province
column.remarks: Province or State of the client"s address.

column.name: postal_code
column.remarks: Code used by Canadian Federal Government Postal System; may also contain an American Zip Code or another country"s postal code.

column.name: country
column.remarks: The country in which the client is located.

column.name: business_phone
column.remarks: Client"s business telephone number and area code.

column.name: home_phone
column.remarks: Client"s Home telephone number and area code.

column.name: cell_phone
column.remarks: Client"s business cell phone number and area code.

column.name: fax_number
column.remarks: Area code and Fax number for the client location.

column.name: email_address
column.remarks: Client"s email address for this location.

column.name: locn_expired_ind
column.remarks: Identifies a previous address for a client which should not be used for any future purposes.

column.name: returned_mail_date
column.remarks: The date when the Ministry receives returned mail for this client location address.

column.name: trust_location_ind
column.remarks: Indicates a location to which funds held in trust will be returned to.

column.name: cli_locn_comment
column.remarks: Text for the comment on the client location.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who last updated this information.

column.name: update_org_unit
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests" offices. Values stored here are for the computer"s use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: add_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time on which the entry was created.

column.name: add_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual performing the entry.

column.name: add_org_unit
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests" offices. Values stored here are for the computer"s use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: Number of times updated

column.name: capture_method_code
column.remarks: The method of data capture for the given tenure application map feature image. E.g. Photogrammetric, orthoPhotography, sketchMap.

column.name: crew_contract_hire_code
column.remarks: A code to indicate the tendering process used to select a contractor.

column.name: description
column.remarks: Full description of code value.

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: The date the value is available for use.

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: The date the value is no longer available for use.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the value was last modified.

column.name: crown_lands_region_code
column.remarks: Describes the CROWN LANDS REGION

column.name: description
column.remarks: Description of the code value

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: Date the code becomes effective

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: Date the code expires

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the value was last modified.

table.name: cut_block
table.remarks: Information about harvesting that takes place on a cut block within a cutting permit, for a file on a harvesting tenure.

column.name: cb_skey
column.remarks: The unique identifer for a cut block.

column.name: hva_skey
column.remarks: The unique identifer for the harvesting authority.

column.name: forest_file_id
column.remarks: File identification assigned to Provincial Forest Use files. Assigned file number. Usually the Licence, Tenure or Private Mark number.

column.name: cutting_permit_id
column.remarks: Identifier for a cutting permit associated with a harvesting tenure.

column.name: timber_mark
column.remarks: Unique identifying set of characters to be stamped or marked on the end of each log to associate the log with the specific authority to harvest and move timber.

column.name: cut_block_id
column.remarks: Identifier for a cut block of a harvesting tenure (within a cutting permit for tenures with cp"s).

column.name: sp_exempt_ind
column.remarks: Only set to "Y" for "Exemption for silviculture Prescriptions" under sec. 30 of the Forest Practices Code of British Columbia Act, eg cut blocks under one hectare, or the use of the land will be incompatible with the establishment of a free growing stand.

column.name: block_status_date
column.remarks: The date on which the current cut block status was set.

column.name: cut_block_description
column.remarks: Description of the cut block

column.name: cut_regulation_code
column.remarks: Identifies the type of regulation applicable to a given cut block. Valid values include "Bark Beetle Regulation", and "Small Scale Salvage".

column.name: block_status_st
column.remarks: The current status of the operational harvesting area, eg., Pending - Planned, Harvesting - Suspended. This is a subset of Timber_status_code.

column.name: reforest_declare_type_code
column.remarks: Identifies the reforestation declaration type. E.g. Coniferous, Deciduos, Mix.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A count of the number of times an entry in the entity has been modified. Used to validate if the current information displayed on a user"s web browser is the most current.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The unique user id of the resource who initially added the entry.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: Timestamp when the event information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the person who performed the last update to the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The timestamp of the last update to the cut block information.

column.name: is_waste_assessment_required
column.remarks: A value indicating whether a harvesting Authority record requires waste assessment or not.

column.name: cut_block_guid
column.remarks: Global Unique Identifier. Created as part of CP / FTA 5 Changes.

column.name: fire_harvesting_reason_code
column.remarks: FIRE_HARVESTING_REASON_CODE is a code that identifies a reason for harvesting related to fire activities (prevention, clean up).Null is a valid value for this column. Null is not a blank space.

column.name: is_under_partition_order
column.remarks: IS_UNDER_PARTITION_ORDER is used as an indicator if the cut block is within a partition order area. Values are null, Y or N. Values may change from Y or N back to Null or vice versa. Null is not a blank space.

column.name: reported_fire_date
column.remarks: REPORTED_FIRE_DATE a date from the provincial FIRE system indicating the date that the fire that caused the FIRE_HARVESTING_REASON_CODE was reported.

column.name: licensee_end_date

table.name: cut_block_open_admin
table.remarks: Used by FTA and RESULTS to track area and date information associated with a cut block and/or opening.

column.name: cut_block_open_admin_id
column.remarks: Primary Unique identifier for a Cut Block Open Admin.

column.name: forest_file_id
column.remarks: File identification assigned to Provincial Forest Use files. Assigned file number. Usually the Licence, Tenure or Private Mark number.

column.name: timber_mark
column.remarks: Unique identifying set of characters to be stamped or marked on the end of each log to associate the log with the specific authority to harvest and move timber.

column.name: cut_block_id
column.remarks: Identifier for a cut block of a harvesting tenure (within a cutting permit for tenures with cp"s).

column.name: cutting_permit_id
column.remarks: Identifier for a cutting permit associated with a quota type tenure.

column.name: disturbance_gross_area
column.remarks: Current gross area of the cut block, in hectares, including all approved amendments.

column.name: disturbance_start_date
column.remarks: Actual date that harvesting started on the cut block.

column.name: disturbance_end_date
column.remarks: For areas being Harvested, this date is associated with the actual or estimated completion of Harvesting. This date s/b entered as part of the regular logging inspection, and updated as required. The actual date will be when the status moves to S - Silv.

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: opening_gross_area
column.remarks: The total area that the opening encompasses (e.g., 120 Hectares).

column.name: planned_harvest_date
column.remarks: The date on which the harvest was planned.

column.name: planned_gross_block_area
column.remarks: Estimated initial gross area of the cut block, in hectares, from the PHSP.

column.name: planned_net_block_area
column.remarks: Estimated planned gross area of the cut block, in hectares, from the PHSP.

column.name: opening_prime_licence_ind
column.remarks: A (Y/N) indicator used to show whether or not this is the primary licence holder for the Opening.

column.name: cb_skey
column.remarks: The unique identifer for a cut block.

table.name: forest_client
table.remarks: Any individual who is dealing, has dealt or plans to deal with the Ministry.

column.name: client_number
column.remarks: Sequentially assigned number to identify a ministry client.

column.name: client_name
column.remarks: The name of the Ministry Client - Company or Individual. Entered as: the full corporate name if a Corporation; the full registered name if a Partnership; the legal surname if an Individual.

column.name: legal_first_name
column.remarks: The client"s legal first name

column.name: legal_middle_name
column.remarks: The client"s legal middle name of names if an individual.

column.name: client_status_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the status of ministry client.

column.name: client_type_code
column.remarks: A code indicating a type of ministry client.

column.name: birthdate
column.remarks: Client"s date of birth, if the client is an individual.

column.name: client_id_type_code
column.remarks: A code indicating a type of identification used to identify a Client. Eg. BC Drivers Licence, Military Number, SIN

column.name: client_identification
column.remarks: The reference number for sources of identification for an Individual client.

column.name: registry_company_type_code
column.remarks: A code indicating a type of Corporate Registry company.

column.name: corp_regn_nmbr
column.remarks: Client"s corporate registration number.

column.name: client_acronym
column.remarks: A familiar aphabetic acronym to be used as an alternate to the ministry"s client number for data entry and display.

column.name: wcb_firm_number
column.remarks: Workers Compensation Board registration number.

column.name: ocg_supplier_nmbr
column.remarks: Office of the Controller General"s reference number for identification of Government Suppliers.

column.name: client_comment
column.remarks: Text for the comment on the client.

column.remarks: The USERID of the individual performing the entry.

table.name: forest_cover
table.remarks: Describes the opening"s forest cover attributes stratified by Forest Cover Polygon which will satisfy Inventory Program requirements.

column.name: forest_cover_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the forest cover.

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: stocking_standard_unit_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifing the stocking standards.

column.name: silv_polygon_no
column.remarks: An unique number identification derived from the IGDS which is assigned to each forest type island, standards unit, eco-strata or survey strata within the opening.

column.name: silv_polygon_area
column.remarks: The total area occupied by each polygon number or stratified land type. The sum of all areas for a polygon(s) should not be greater than the area of the SU.

column.name: silv_polygon_net_area
column.remarks: Net Area of the Polygon (i.e. SILV POLYGON AREA less non-mapped area (FOREST COVER NON MAPPED AREA))

column.name: stocking_class_code
column.remarks: The stocking class code for the primary tree species in the previous stand (for the area under the prescription).

column.name: stocking_status_code
column.remarks: A code to describe the previous stand type for the area under the prescription.

column.name: stocking_type_code
column.remarks: A further classification of the stocking status for the polygon.

column.name: reference_year
column.remarks: The year age and height measurements were recorded.

column.name: reentry_year
column.remarks: The time to the next harvest (i.e. the next harvest year).

column.name: site_class_code
column.remarks: This code indicates the quality of the land. Note: This column is not maintained by the system.

column.name: site_index
column.remarks: The site index for the primary tree species in the previous stand (for the area under the prescription).

column.name: site_index_source_code
column.remarks: A code describing the source, or origin, of the estimated site index.

column.name: silv_reserve_code
column.remarks: A code for the type of reserve. Values are group (b), uniform (u) or variable (v).

column.name: silv_reserve_objective_code
column.remarks: A code used to define the primary reserve objective. ( e.g. Riparian, Wildlife Habitat) .

column.name: tree_species_code
column.remarks: The secondary tree species of Crown timber that was cut, damaged, destroyed or removed without authority

column.name: tree_cover_pattern_code
column.remarks: The dispursion of trees over the area.

column.name: results_submission_id
column.remarks: Used to link information about a data submission. A submission may have many rows of Silviculture (Form A), Activities (Form B), and Forest Cover/Milestones (Form C) information. This attribute will be receiving a system generated number from the Electronic Submission Framework.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who last updated the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A counter identifying the number of times this record as been modified. Used in the web page access to determine if the record as been modified since the data was first retrieved.

table.name: forest_cover_archive
table.remarks: Forest Cover Archive contains the exact information from the Forest Cover with each update. Existing Forest cover entries are saved down to the Forest Cover Archive instead of being updated, thus maintaining a complete history of all changes.

table.name: forest_cover_layer
table.remarks: The various levels of growth within the forest cover. Typically defined in four layers.

column.name: forest_cover_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the forest cover.

column.name: forest_cover_layer_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the forest cover layer.

column.name: forest_cover_layer_code
column.remarks: A code that uniquely identifies each layer, horizontal stratum, in a stand. Each layer is normally characterized as a distinct canopy containing a common forest cover structure with timber of similiar ages and heights.

column.name: stocking_type_code
column.remarks: A further classification of the stocking status for the polygon.

column.name: stocking_status_code
column.remarks: A code to describe the previous stand type for the area under the prescription.

column.name: total_stems_per_ha
column.remarks: The total stems counted per hectare.

column.name: total_well_spaced_stems_per_ha
column.remarks: A new business rule around maximum cap on well spaced stems.

column.name: well_spaced_stems_per_ha
column.remarks: The total well spaced stems per hectare.

column.name: free_growing_stems_per_ha
column.remarks: The total free growing stems per hectare.

column.name: crown_closure_pct
column.remarks: The percentage of ground area covered by vertically projected tree crown areas.

column.name: basal_area
column.remarks: For inventory label, this field refers to all total stem above 12.5 cm DBH. For silviculture label, this field refers to basal area for well spaced preferred and acceptable stems above 12.5 cm DBH.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A counter identifying the number of times this record as been modified. Used in the web page access to determine if the record as been modified since the data was first retrieved.

table.name: forest_file_client
table.remarks: Identifies the licencee assigned to a given file for a specified duration of time.

column.name: forest_file_client_skey
column.remarks: See FTA data model for more details.

column.name: forest_file_id
column.remarks: File identification assigned to Provincial Forest Use files. Assigned file number. Usually the Licence, Tenure or Private Mark number.

column.name: client_number
column.remarks: Sequentially assigned number to identify a ministry client.

column.name: client_locn_code
column.remarks: A code to uniquely identify, within each client, the addresses of different divisions or locations at which the client operates. The location code is sequentially assigned starting with "00" for the client"s permanent address.

column.name: forest_file_client_type_code
column.remarks: Identifes the client types codes applicable for assignment to forest files.

column.name: licensee_start_date
column.remarks: The licensee start date for a given file.

column.name: licensee_end_date
column.remarks: The licensee end date for a given file.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A count of the number of times an entry in the entity has been modified. Used to validate if the current information displayed on a user"s web browser is the most current.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The unique user id of the resource who initially added the entry.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: Timestamp when the event information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who last updated this information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.remarks: System generated unique identifier

column.name: mgmt_unit_type_code
column.remarks: The unique identifier for the management unit type.

column.name: mgmt_unit_id
column.remarks: The administrative management unit identifier defined by the ministry for managing the forest land, eg. 41C.

column.name: description
column.remarks: Description of the Managment Unit Identifer. E.g. Dawson Creek TSA Block C.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The user that created the record.

column.name: entry_timestamp

column.name: update_userid

column.name: expiry_date

table.name: forest_stewardship_plan
table.remarks: A plan submitted by a forest industry licensee stating how the BC Government?s objectives for managing the province?s forest resources will be met. It identifies the plan-holder?s obligations for a five-year period.

column.name: fsp_id
column.remarks: Unique identifier for Forest Stewardship Plan

column.name: fsp_amendment_number
column.remarks: Identifies amendment level of FSP

column.name: fsp_status_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the status of the Forest Stewardship Plan. Examples include but are not limited to SUB (submitted), REJ (rejected) and APP (approved).

column.name: fsp_amendment_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the type of amendment to an FSP. Examples include Original, Amendment and Replacement

column.name: licensee_amendment_name
column.remarks: The licensee-specified name given to the amendment.

column.name: plan_name
column.remarks: Textual name of FSP, provided by plan holder

column.name: plan_term_years
column.remarks: Length of FSP term in years

column.name: plan_term_months
column.remarks: Length of FSP term in months beyond the indicated term in years (PLAN_TERM_YEARS).

column.name: plan_start_date
column.remarks: The date the FSP comes into legal effect. Set by the FSP Decision Maker.

column.name: plan_end_date
column.remarks: The date the FSP expires. The PLAN END DATE is calculated using either the Term Year/Months entered by the user or the End date.

column.name: plan_submission_date
column.remarks: Date FSP was submitted to MoFR

column.name: plan_decision_date
column.remarks: The date on which the original FSP or amendment is approved or rejected.

column.name: plan_decision_userid
column.remarks: The user that approved or rejected the FSP or amendment.

column.name: transition_ind
column.remarks: Indicates when the FSP is transitional. A transitional FSP is an original submission created from an existing FDP that does not require approval.

column.name: identified_areas_update_ind
column.remarks: Indicates when Declared Areas data will be changed as part of the amendment.

column.name: fdu_update_ind
column.remarks: Indicates when FDU data will be changed as part of the amendment.

column.name: stocking_standard_update_ind
column.remarks: Indicates when Stocking Standard data will be changed as part of the amendment.

column.name: frpa197_election_ind
column.remarks: Indicates whether a licensee has elected (under the Forest and Range Practices Act section 197 legislation) to roll over existing cut blocks that were created under the authority of the Forest Practices Code Act. By rolling these cut blocks over, the licensee indicates that the blocks will be governed under the Stocking Standards identified within their approved Forest Stewardship Plan.

column.name: contact_name
column.remarks: Name of a contact for the submitting licensee.

column.name: telephone_number
column.remarks: The business telephone number including area code of the contact for submitting licensee

column.name: email_address
column.remarks: Email of contact for submitting licensee

column.name: amendment_approval_date
column.remarks: Date amendment to plan approved by MoFR

column.name: amendment_authority
column.remarks: Identifier of MoFR decision maker

column.name: amendment_approval_requird_ind
column.remarks: Indicates if the amendment needs MoFR approval

column.name: amendment_submission_date
column.remarks: Date amendment to plan submitted by plan holder

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A count of the number of times an entry in the entity has been modified. Used to validate if the current information displayed on a user"s web browser is the most current.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The userid responsible for inserting data into a table.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: Contains the system timestamp when data in a table was inserted.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who last updated this road section record.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The timestamp of the last update to the road section record.

table.name: forhealth_rslt
table.remarks: A table which stores the forest health survey results.

column.name: forhealth_rslt_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the forest health damage agent occurrance.

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: forest_cover_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the forest cover.

column.name: forest_cover_layer_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the forest cover layer.

column.name: silv_damage_agent_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the category of insect or disease that has caused a disturbance in the stands history. Stands with a disturbance caused by insects or disease can be further described by the ACTIVITY SUB CODE. The code for the damage agent as it is currently collected (94-3). The FIP based version of Damage Agent code, retained on an as is basis until migration to a stable Ministry version of Damage Agent is availible.

column.name: incidence_pct
column.remarks: The percentage of the Standards Unit or Opening that the agent is affecting as defined by the survey strata.

column.name: incidence_area
column.remarks: The area in hectares of the region involved.

column.name: observation_date
column.remarks: The date this observation was made.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who last updated the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: Internal counter used by the system to avoid conflicting updates to the record.

column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the forest health damage agent occurrance.

column.remarks: A code indicating the category of insect or disease that has caused a disturbance in the stands history. Stands with a disturbance caused by insects or disease can be further described by the ACTIVITY SUB CODE. The code for the damage agent as it is currently collected (94-3). The FIP based version of Damage Agent code, retained on an as is basis until migration to a stable Ministry version of Damage Agent is availible.

column.name: incidence_pct
column.remarks: The percentage of the Standards Unit or Opening that the agent is affecting as defined by the survey strata.

column.name: incidence_area
column.remarks: The area in hectares of the region involved.

column.name: observation_date
column.remarks: The date this observation was made.

column.name: forest_cover_archive_date
column.remarks: The date the forest cover entry was archived to this entity.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who last updated the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: Internal counter used by the system to avoid conflicting updates to the record.

table.name: fsp_standards_regime_xref
table.remarks: A cross reference entity that allows for the relationship between a Forest Stewardship Plan and a Standards Regime. An FSP may refer to many Standards, and a Standard may be included in many FSPs.

column.name: fsp_id
column.remarks: Unique identifier for Forest Stewardship Plan

column.name: fsp_amendment_number
column.remarks: Identifies amendment level of FSP

column.name: standards_regime_id
column.remarks: Unique identifier for the STANDARD REGIME entry.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A count of the number of times an entry in the entity has been modified. Used to validate if the current information displayed on a user"s web browser is the most current.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The userid responsible for inserting data into a table.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: Contains the system timestamp when data in a table was inserted.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who last updated the record.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The timestamp of the last update to the record.

column.name: fsp_status_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the status of the Forest Stewardship Plan. Examples include but are not limited to SUB (submitted), REJ (rejected) and APP (approved).

column.name: description

column.name: effective_date

column.name: expiry_date

column.name: update_timestamp

column.name: harvest_auth_extend_reas_code

column.name: expiry_date

column.name: harvest_auth_status_code
column.remarks: The after status image of the harvesting authority. The status indicates the point the harvesting authority is at in it"s lifecycle. Examples are: PP - Planning, HA - Harvesting, LC - Logging Complete, and S - Silviculture.

column.name: description
column.remarks: Description of the code value

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: Date the code becomes effective

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: Date the code expires

column.name: update_timestamp

table.name: harvest_sale
table.remarks: Sale information relating to specific tenures, usually let via the competitive bid process. Information on planned sale and actual sale details are required for Small Business tenures.

column.name: forest_file_id
column.remarks: File identification assigned to Provincial Forest Use files. Assigned file number. Usually the Licence, Tenure or Private Mark number.

column.name: sb_fund_ind
column.remarks: See FTA data model for more details.

column.name: sale_method_code
column.remarks: Method for type of sale of timber under a tenure. Default: Sealed Tender.

column.name: sale_type_cd
column.remarks: Describes the type of timber sale.

column.name: planned_sale_date
column.remarks: Estimated sale date of tenure.

column.name: tender_opening_dt
column.remarks: The advertised date that sealed tenders will be opened or the date the auction was held.

column.name: plnd_sb_cat_code
column.remarks: Describes the type of timber sale.

column.name: sold_sb_cat_code
column.remarks: Describes the type of timber sale.

column.name: total_bidders
column.remarks: Total number of applicants that bid on this sale. To be eventually replaced by a calculated field.

column.name: lumpsum_bonus_amt
column.remarks: Lump sum bonus amount for securing harvesting rights on ministry controlled land.

column.name: cash_sale_est_vol
column.remarks: The estimated volume in cubic meters sold under a Cash Sale type Timber Mark. This is mandatory for Cash Sales, and the default is zero for non-cash sales.

column.name: cash_sale_tot_dol
column.remarks: The total dollars received for a sale sold under a Cash Sale type Timber Mark. This is mandatory for cash sales, and defaults to zero for non-cash sales.

column.name: payment_method_cd
column.remarks: The method of collecting the payment for the licence, such as "Cash" or "Automatic Invoice".

column.name: salvage_ind
column.remarks: Indicates if the timber sale is for salvage wood.

column.name: sale_volume
column.remarks: The volume (m3) advertised for the sale; or, if not advertised, the volume offered for sale.

column.name: admin_area_ind
column.remarks: Admin Area Indicator indicates whether cash sales are within an administrative area.

column.name: minor_facility_ind
column.remarks: Indicates whether a minor processing facility is on site with an active permit.

column.name: bcts_org_unit
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests offices. Values stored here are for the computers use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: fta_bonus_bid
column.remarks: The FTA BONUS BID is the amount paid out as a bonus for the award of the tenure.

column.name: fta_bonus_offer
column.remarks: The FTA BONUS OFFER is the amount offered as a bonus for the award of the tenure.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A count of the number of times an entry in the entity has been modified. Used to validate if the current information displayed on a user"s web browser is the most current.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The unique user id of the resource who initially added the entry.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: Timestamp when the event information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: Id of user making last change to data.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: Timestamp of this data"s last update.

column.name: harvest_type_code
column.remarks: Identifies the type of harvesting authority. Valid values include "Green", "Road", "Multi-Mark", and "Fort St. John".

column.name: description
column.remarks: Description of the code value

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: Date the code becomes effective

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: Date the code expires

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the value was last modified.

table.name: harvesting_authority
table.remarks: Information about the timber cutting permission for a timber tenure.

column.name: hva_skey
column.remarks: Reference from FTA.

column.name: forest_file_id
column.remarks: File identification assigned to Provincial Forest Use files. Assigned file number. Usually the Licence, Tenure or Private Mark number.

column.name: cutting_permit_id
column.remarks: Identifier for a cutting permit associated with a quota type harvesting tenure.

column.name: harvesting_authority_id
column.remarks: The licensee provided identifier for non-cp related harvesting tenure. E.g. Fort St. John harvesting authority.

column.name: forest_district
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests offices. Values stored here are for the computers use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: district_admn_zone
column.remarks: District Admin Zone is a free format field used internally by the districts to group files within a district for reporting purposes. Examples of use are setting the field to a geographic area or to a persons initials. Reports can be pulled off by District Admin Zone to aid work management. This field is not used by all districts.

column.name: geographic_district
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests offices. Values stored here are for the computers use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: mgmt_unit_id
column.remarks: The administrative management unit identifier defined by the ministry for managing the forest tenure, eg. 41 - Dawson Creek TSA.

column.name: mgmt_unit_type_code
column.remarks: The unique identifier for the management unit type.

column.name: licence_to_cut_code
column.remarks: The purpose or reason that the licence to cut was granted, eg., right of way.

column.name: harvest_type_code
column.remarks: Identifies the type of harvesting authority. Valid values include "Green", "Road", "Multi-Mark", and "Fort St. John".

column.name: harvest_auth_status_code
column.remarks: The after status image of the harvesting authority. The status indicates the point the harvesting authority is at in it"s lifecycle. Examples are: PP - Planning, HA - Harvesting, LC - Logging Complete, and S - Silviculture.

column.name: tenure_term
column.remarks: Term of the tenure (in months).

column.name: status_date
column.remarks: The date that the harvest authorization status was last updated.

column.name: issue_date
column.remarks: Date the harvest authorization was issued.

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: Initial expiry date set upon activation of the harvest authorization.

column.name: extend_date
column.remarks: Date to which the harvest authorization validity has been extended. Current expiry date.

column.name: extend_count
column.remarks: Count of the number of extensions to the expiry date that the harvest authorization has had.

column.name: harvest_auth_extend_reas_code
column.remarks: Code to indicate the reason to extend the life of the timber mark.

column.name: quota_type_code
column.remarks: A Timber Supply Area will have volumes assigned to one or more partitions, which are in effect different timber type classifications, or geographic locations. Under each partition are the different apportionments. Examples of Partitions are Conventional

column.name: crown_lands_region_code
column.remarks: Describes the CROWN LANDS REGION

column.name: salvage_type_code
column.remarks: Code describing the salvage type.

column.name: cascade_split_code
column.remarks: Code to indicate the administrative split for the timber mark, east or west of the Cascade Mountains, for tracking timber volume information.

column.name: catastrophic_ind
column.remarks: Indicates if the damage to the stand of timber is catastrophic. Otherwise, it is endemic.

column.name: crown_granted_ind
column.remarks: Indicator to signify whether the land that the timber mark pertains to has a verifiable crown grant document.

column.name: cruise_based_ind
column.remarks: Indicates whether a cruise was used for billing purposes.

column.name: deciduous_ind
column.remarks: Indicates whether the timber mark is primarily for harvesting deciduous species. Otherwise, coniferous.

column.name: bcaa_folio_number
column.remarks: BC Assessment Authority Folio Number for the land that the cutting permit/Timber Mark pertains to, if applicable, or the LTO number. BCAA Folio Numbers are in the format C15 733 06604.140-1-2; the format for LTO numbers is nnn-nnn-nnn.

column.name: location
column.remarks: Contains the land legal information for the harvest authority. Land legal information indicates where the land is legally located, such as "Lot 3 of DL 343, Plan 3422".

column.name: higher_level_plan_reference
column.remarks: Indicates the higher level plan reference for the given harvest authority. E.g. For Fort St. John, this could be "Sustainable Forest Management Plan".

column.name: harvest_area
column.remarks: Identifes the harvest area in hectares for harvesting authorites without spatial.

column.name: retirement_date
column.remarks: The date the harvesting authority was retired from the spatial conflict layer.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A count of the number of times an entry in the entity has been modified. Used to validate if the current information displayed on a user"s web browser is the most current.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The unique user id of the resource who initially added the entry.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: Timestamp when the event information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who last updated this information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: is_waste_assessment_required
column.remarks: A value indicating whether a harvesting Authority record requires waste assessment or not.

column.name: is_cp_extensn_appl_fee_waived
column.remarks: A value that is mandatory on extension to indicate if the Extension application fee has been waived.

column.name: is_cp_extension_appl_fee_paid
column.remarks: A value to show if the extension application fee has been paid.N if IS_EXT_APP_FEE_WAIVED = "Y","U" otherwise. Not mandatory on extension

column.name: is_within_fibre_recovery_zone
column.remarks: A value to show whether a Cutting Permit is in Fibre Recovery Zones or not. The valid values include: "Y" it"s within the Fibre Recovery Zones "N" It"s not within the Fibre Recovery Zones "U" Unknown.

column.name: harvesting_authority_guid
column.remarks: Contains Harvesting Authority Global Unique Identifier

table.name: hauling_authority

table.name: open_viewable_category
table.remarks: OPEN_VIEWABLE_CATEGORY identifies the open categories that can be accessed by all licensees using the application. The system must use this stored information as a means to allow access for all users to openings that have an opening category with this designation enabled or openings in a Free Growing status. All other opening categories will continue to be restricted based on the current business rules.

column.name: open_category_code
column.remarks: A code used to describe the category for the opening. The opening categories reference the governing applicable legislation and are determined by responsibility, opening origin, tenure type and prescription type.

column.name: opening_status_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the status of the prescription. Examples include but are not limited to DFT (draft) and APP (approved). A subset of the STATUS_CODE table.

column.name: viewable_ind
column.remarks: Indicates whether the category is viewable for all users in RESULTS. Allowable values are "Y" and "N".

table.name: opening
table.remarks: The administrative boundary of an area of land on which silviculture activities are planned and completed.

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: geo_district_no
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests" offices. Values stored here are for the computer"s use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: admin_district_no
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests" offices. Values stored here are for the computer"s use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: mapsheet_letter
column.remarks: BCGS/NTG letter. Values are A - P, and W.

column.name: mapsheet_square
column.remarks: BCGS NUMBER or NTG NUMBER and LETTER. BCGS NUMBER values are 1-100, and NTG NUMBER values are 1-16 with NTG LETTER values A - H, and W.

column.name: mapsheet_quad
column.remarks: Quadrant. Blank if NTG number value entered; 0 - 4 if BCGS number entered.

column.name: mapsheet_sub_quad
column.remarks: Sub-Quadrant. Blank if NTG number value entered; 0 - 4 if BCGS number entered.

column.name: opening_number
column.remarks: An unique identifier up to four characters long that describes the opening on a specified mapsheet.

column.name: opening_locn_name
column.remarks: A descriptive name of the geographic location of the opening.

column.name: open_category_code
column.remarks: A code used to describe the category for the opening. The opening categories reference the governing applicable legislation and are determined by responsibility, opening origin, tenure type and prescription type.

column.name: licensee_opening_id
column.remarks: A unique identifier provided by the Licensee to identify the Opening Number.

column.name: tsb_number_code
column.remarks: The unique code identifying a Timber Supply Block.

column.name: opening_status_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the status of the opening. Examples include but are not limited to DFT (draft) and APP (approved). A subset of the STATUS_CODE table.

column.name: org_unit_no
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests" offices. Values stored here are for the computer"s use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: dist_admin_zone
column.remarks: The code for the district zone where the opening is located. Codes are unique within each district.

column.name: max_allow_permnt_access_pct
column.remarks: Maximum percentage of the Total Area Under the Prescription that may be occupied by permanent access structures, including roads, landings, gravel pits, borrow pits or other.

column.name: prev_age_class_code
column.remarks: The age classification of the primary tree species in the previous stand (for the area under the prescription).

column.name: prev_site_index
column.remarks: The site index for the primary tree species in the previous stand (for the area under the prescription).

column.name: prev_site_index_source_code
column.remarks: The site index source code for the primary tree species in the previous stand (for the area under the opening).

column.name: prev_height_class_code
column.remarks: The height clan code (or the primary tree species in the previous stand (for the area under the prescription).

column.name: prev_site_class_code
column.remarks: This code indicates the quality of the land. Note: This column is not maintained by the system.

column.name: prev_stocking_class_code
column.remarks: The stocking class code for the primary tree species in the previous stand (for the area under the prescription).

column.name: prev_stocking_status_code
column.remarks: A code to describe the previous stand type for the area under the prescription.

column.name: prev_tree_spp1_code
column.remarks: The secondary tree species of Crown timber that was cut, damaged, destroyed or removed without authority

column.name: prev_tree_spp2_code
column.remarks: The secondary tree species of Crown timber that was cut, damaged, destroyed or removed without authority

column.name: app_ent_by_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who entered the prescription information.

column.name: approve_date
column.remarks: The date on which the prescription was approved.

column.name: amendment_ind
column.remarks: A Y/N indicator, indicating if the prescription has been amended.

column.name: results_submission_id
column.remarks: Used to link information about a data submission. A submission may have many rows of Silviculture (Form A), Activities (Form B), and Forest Cover/Milestones (Form C) information. This attribute will be receiving a system generated number from the Electronic Submission Framework.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who last updated the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A counter identifying the number of times this record as been modified. Used in the web page access to determine if the record as been modified since the data was first retrieved.

table.name: opening_amendment_history
table.remarks: Shows history of amendments made to an opening. Keeps track of dates, times, user identification and user name.

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: opening_amendment_number
column.remarks: A system generated value uniquely identifying an amendment.

column.name: amendment_userid
column.remarks: The user ID of the person who initiates the amendment. Changes the status from APP to AMD.

column.name: amendment_date
column.remarks: The date the amendment was first initiated.

column.name: submitted_by_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the person who submitted the amendment.

column.name: submitted_date
column.remarks: The date and time the amendment was submitted.

column.name: app_ent_by_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who entered the prescription information.

column.name: approve_date
column.remarks: The date that SP or amendment has been approved (or put into effect (for MoF SP"s).

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who last updated the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: Internal counter used by the system to avoid conflicting updates to the record.

table.name: opening_attachment
table.remarks: A file attached to an Opening for purpose of clarification or exhibit.

column.name: opening_attachment_file_id
column.remarks: Uniquely identifies the attached file.

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: attachment_name
column.remarks: File name, not including the path, of the attached file at the time it was uploaded.

column.name: attachment_description
column.remarks: Short description of the contents of the file.

column.name: mime_type_code
column.remarks: Multipurpose Internet Mail Extension (MIME) type is the method used by Web browsers to associate files of a certain type with helper applications that display files of that type.

column.name: attachment_data
column.remarks: The attached file.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: User who attached the file to the Opening.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: Date and time that the file was attached to the Opening.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: Userid of the user who last upated the attachment.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: Date and time that the attachment was last updated.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A counter identifying the number of times this record as been modified. Used in the web page access to determine if the record as been modified since the data was first retrieved.

column.name: opening_attachment_guid
column.remarks: Unique identifier used to identify, save, retrieve or delete the Opening Attachment in the object storage. Saved as the ID within the metadata as well as the obfuscated file name

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: silviculture_comment_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the ISIS comment.

table.name: opening_geometry
table.remarks: The spatial representation for an opening, which is the administrative boundary of an area of land on which silviculture activities are planned and completed.

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: geometry
column.remarks: Spatial coordinate representation of the polygon related to the Opening.

column.name: feature_area
column.remarks: The area of the polygon pertaining to the Opening measured in square metres.

column.name: feature_perimeter
column.remarks: The perimeter of the polygon pertaining to the Opening measured in metres.

column.name: feature_class_skey
column.remarks: Unique identifier of the feature class.

column.name: observation_date
column.remarks: Captures the date of observation for the given feature image.

column.name: data_quality_comment
column.remarks: Allows users to specify comments regarding the accuracy and general quality of the given feature"s data.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who last updated the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A counter identifying the number of times this record as been modified. Used in the web page access to determine if the record as been modified since the data was first retrieved.

table.name: opening_land_status
table.remarks: Identifies the land status of the entire opening on a given date. These attributes are derived from the FOREST_COVER table.

column.name: opening_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the opening.

column.name: opening_land_status_date
column.remarks: The date of the last status update.

column.name: np_unn_area
column.remarks: The non-productive unnatural area, expressed in hectares.

column.name: np_nat_area
column.remarks: The non-productive natural area, expressed in hectares.

column.name: np_for_area
column.remarks: The non-productive forested area, expressed in hectares.

column.name: nsr_npl_area
column.remarks: The not sufficiently restocked nonplantable area, expressed in hectares.

column.name: nsr_nat_area
column.remarks: The not sufficiently restocked natural area, expressed in hectares.

column.name: nsr_pl_area
column.remarks: The not sufficiently restocked plantable area, expressed in hectares.

column.name: sr_art_area
column.remarks: The sufficiently restocked artificial area, expressed in hectares.

column.name: sr_nat_area
column.remarks: The sufficiently restocked natural area, expressed in hectares.

column.name: mat_area
column.remarks: The mature natural and artificial area , expressed in hectares. The Mature area field was added to the database in July 2000. Prior to July 2000 all Mature area was stored in the SR Artificial and SR Natural Area.

column.name: fg_norm_area
column.remarks: The free growing area, expressed in hectares, of all polygons that have the "Free Growing" indicator set to "Y". is area is not double counted against the "SR" total.

column.name: nc_br_area
column.remarks: The non-commerical brush area, expressed in hectares. Area > 4 hectares and Ministry"s responsibility. Area has special significance in MLSIS and is not reflected in ISIS.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who last updated the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A counter used to ensure data integrity. This item should be incremented during each update.

column.name: opening_status_code
column.remarks: A code indicating the status of the prescription. Examples include but are not limited to DFT (draft) and APP (approved). A subset of the STATUS_CODE table.

column.name: description
column.remarks: Full description of code value.

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: The date the value is available for use.

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: The date the value is no longer available for use.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the value was last modified.

column.name: org_unit_no
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests" offices. Values stored here are for the computer"s use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: org_unit_code
column.remarks: Identifies any office within the ministry. First character identifies Exec, HQ branch, Region, or District. Next two chars identify the office name; next two the section (HQ Branch) or program (Region or District); last char identifies the subsection.

column.name: org_unit_name
column.remarks: The name or title of a ministry office or section; for example Kamloops Forest Region; Silviculture Branch; Kispiox Forest District Protection program.

column.name: location_code
column.remarks: Unique identifier for one of the office locations within the Ministry of Forests.

column.name: area_code
column.remarks: The 3 digit numer that identifies each telephone service area in a country.

column.name: telephone_no
column.remarks: The general office telephone number (excluding the area code) for a Ministry of Forests office.

column.name: org_level_code
column.remarks: Represents the organizational level of the Ministry, and is one of: D - District Forestry Office, E - Executive, H - Headquarters Branch, R - Regional Forestry Office.

column.name: office_name_code
column.remarks: Represents an office within a specific organizational level.

column.name: rollup_region_no
column.remarks: Identifier designating the region to which the org unit is rolled into for reporting purposes. Values stored here are for the computers use only, and are not to be used by people as "Ministry Codes".

column.name: rollup_region_code
column.remarks: Identifier designating the region to which the org unit is rolled into for reporting purposes.

column.name: rollup_dist_no
column.remarks: Identifier designating the district to which the org unit is rolled into for reporting purposes. Values stored here are for the computers use only and are not to be used by people as "Ministry Codes".

column.name: rollup_dist_code
column.remarks: Identifier designating the district to which the org unit is rolled into for reporting purposes.

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: The date the Organizational Unit became effective as a valid Org Unit within the ministry"s organizational structure.

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: The date the Organizational Unit is Obsoleted and is no longer an active Org Unit within the ministrys organizational structure. At the determination of Human Resources Branch, an expired Org Unit may be retained for historical purposed, or may be deleted.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last modification.

column.name: payment_method_code
column.remarks: The method of collecting the payment for the licence, such as "Cash" or "Automatic Invoice".

column.name: description
column.remarks: Description of the code

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: Date the code is effective

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: Date the code expires

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the value was last modified.

table.name: planting_rslt
table.remarks: Collects planned and actual information about a planting activity performed on an Activity Treatment Unit.

column.name: activity_treatment_unit_id
column.remarks: System generated value uniquely identifying the Activity Treatment Unit.

column.name: results_ind
column.remarks: Indicates whether or not the planting information is planning information (N) or the result of actual planting performed.

column.name: plant_rslt_seq_no
column.remarks: Internal processing variable used to maintain order of the plant stock allotments for a specific ATU.

column.name: silv_tree_species_code
column.remarks: The secondary tree species of Crown timber that was cut, damaged, destroyed or removed without authority

column.name: number_planted
column.remarks: The number of stems planted for each species within the ATU.

column.name: planted_no_beyond_xfer_limit
column.remarks: IN THE OVERFLOW TABLE.

column.name: bid_price_per_tree
column.remarks: The anticipated (RESULTS IND = N) or actual (RESULTS IND = Y) bid price per tree for a planting contract.

column.name: seedlot_number
column.remarks: The unique number (key) assigned to a quantity of seed of a particular species and quality from a given location collected at a given time.

column.name: veg_lot_id
column.remarks: An identifier that is system generated by the system to uniquely identify this record.

column.name: request_skey
column.remarks: A surrogate key to uniquely identify each Spar Request.

column.name: item_id
column.remarks: A unique identifier for each item within a request. It is alphabetically assigned (A, B,...Z).

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who entered the information.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The USERID of the individual who last updated the information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: Internal counter used by the system to avoid conflicting updates to the record.

column.name: climate_based_seed_xfer_ind
column.remarks: CLIMATE BASED SEED TRANSFER - Indicates that the seedlings 'transferred beyond limit' are based on the Ministry's Climate Change Seed Policy.

table.name: prov_forest_use
table.remarks: General header information to identify the type of forest land use managed by the Ministry of Forests (eg., timber tenures, grazing tenures, recreation files, forest service roads, etc.). This is the main access point for examining land use information. Recommend that this entity be renamed to FOREST TENURE or FOREST FILE in the future (TF - this needs more analysis to determine what is indentified in this entity - licence, permit, etc and if all rights identified belong here).

column.name: forest_file_id
column.remarks: File identification assigned to Provincial Forest Use files. Assigned file number. Usually the Licence, Tenure or Private Mark number.

column.name: file_status_st
column.remarks: The current status of the forest land use, e.g. Pending - Planned, Harvesting - Suspended, Active. This is a subset of timber status code.

column.name: file_status_date
column.remarks: The date on which the current forest land use status was set.

column.name: file_type_code
column.remarks: The FTAS code to indicate the type of file, and often synonymous with a tenure or a project.

column.name: forest_region
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests" offices. Values stored here are for the computer"s use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: bcts_org_unit
column.remarks: Unique physical identifier for the storage of organizational unit codes for the Ministry of Forests" offices. Values stored here are for the computer"s use only, and are not to be used by people as "ministry codes".

column.name: sb_funded_ind
column.remarks: Indicates if the harvest tenure is small business funded.

column.name: district_admin_zone
column.remarks: District Admin Zone is a free format field used internally by the districts to group files within a district for reporting purposes. Examples of use are setting the field to a geographic area or to a persons initials. Reports can be pulled off by District Admin Zone to aid work management. This field is not used by all districts.

column.name: mgmt_unit_type
column.remarks: The unique identifier for the management unit type.

column.name: mgmt_unit_id
column.remarks: The administrative management unit identifier defined by the ministry for managing the forest tenure, eg. 41 - Dawson Creek TSA.

column.name: revision_count
column.remarks: A count of the number of times an entry in the entity has been modified. Used to validate if the current information displayed on a user"s web browser is the most current.

column.name: entry_userid
column.remarks: The unique user id of the resource who initially added the entry.

column.name: entry_timestamp
column.remarks: Timestamp when the event information was entered.

column.name: update_userid
column.remarks: The userid of the individual who last updated this information.

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time of the last update.

column.name: forest_tenure_guid
column.remarks: A global unique identifier used to globally identified a Forest Tenure (aka, Forest File). It is used for exchanging data between external applications and services.

column.name: quota_type_code
column.remarks: A Timber Supply Area will have volumes assigned to one or more partitions, which are in effect different timber type classifications, or geographic locations. Under each partition are the different apportionments. Examples of Partitions are Conventional

column.name: description
column.remarks: Description of the code value

column.name: effective_date
column.remarks: Date the code becomes effective

column.name: expiry_date
column.remarks: Date the code expires

column.name: update_timestamp
column.remarks: The date and time the value was last modified.

column.name: reforest_declare_type_code
column.remarks: Identifies the reforestation declaration type. E.g. Coniferous, Deciduos, Mix.

column.name: description
